Name: LED Lighting Retrofit
Description: Full replacement of fluorescent/HPS lighting with LED. Reduces electricity consumption 40-60%; typical payback 3-5 yr.

Name: HVAC Heat Pump Upgrade
Source: IEA ETP 2024 (heat pump LCOP); EU taxonomy Annex I
Description: Replace gas-fired HVAC with industrial heat pump (COP ≥3.5). Aligned with EU Taxonomy Article 10 climate mitigation criteria.

Name: Motor & Drive Efficiency (IE3/IE4)
Source: IEA Industrial Motor Systems 2023; EU MEPS Regulation 2019/1781
Description: Upgrade motors to IE3/IE4 class + variable speed drives on pumps/fans/compressors. 20-30% electricity saving on motor loads.

Name: Compressed Air Leak Repair
Source: IEA Compressed Air Best Practice Guide 2022; Odyssee-MURE
Description: Ultrasonic leak detection + repair programme. Average 20-30% reduction in compressed air energy use.

Name: Thermal Insulation Upgrade
Source: JRC 2024 (Pulp & Paper EE scenarios); EU Taxonomy Delegated Act 2021
Description: Pipe/vessel insulation upgrade and building envelope improvement. Reduces heat loss 15-25%.

Name: Rooftop Solar PV Installation
Source: IEA ETP 2024 (solar PV LCOE EU); EU taxonomy Art. 10 criteria
Description: On-site solar PV (50-200 kWp). Avg EU industrial capex ~€700/kWp (2024). Self-consumption offsets grid electricity Scope 2.

Name: Green Electricity Tariff / PPA
Source: EU Energy Efficiency Directive 2023/1791 Art. 11; RE100 cost benchmarks
Description: Switch to certified renewable electricity tariff or sign Power Purchase Agreement. Near-zero capex; covers Scope 2 market-based emissions.

Name: Industrial Heat Pump (Process Heat)
Source: IEA ETP 2024 (heat pump levelised cost); EU taxonomy Annex I
Description: Replace gas-fired process heat boiler with high-temp heat pump (T ≤150°C). Applicable to medium/high-emission facilities with significant thermal demand.

Name: Biomass Boiler Replacement
Source: IEA Bioenergy 2023; EU taxonomy Delegated Act 2021/2139 criteria 4.13
Description: Replace fossil fuel boiler with certified sustainable biomass. High-emission facilities only. GHG savings ≥70% vs fossil baseline per EU taxonomy.

Name: Electric Forklift Fleet Conversion
Source: IEA Transport 2024; EU taxonomy Art. 10 (low-carbon transport)
Description: Convert diesel/LPG forklifts to electric. Reduces on-site combustion Scope 1 emissions from logistics.

Name: Waste Heat Recovery (ORC/HEX)
Source: IEA Industrial Energy Efficiency 2022; Glenk et al. ZEW 2024
Description: Organic Rankine Cycle or heat exchanger network to recover waste heat from exhaust/process streams. Best suited to medium/high-emission facilities.

Name: AI Production Scheduling Optimisation
Source: IEA Digitalisation & Energy 2023; EU taxonomy Art. 10 (manufacturing efficiency)
Description: ML-based production scheduling to minimise energy peaks, reduce idle time and optimise batch throughput. 3-7% energy intensity reduction.

Name: Steam Trap & Distribution Audit
Source: World Bank Industrial EE Programme Guidelines 2024; IEA Steam Best Practice
Description: Systematic steam trap survey, replacement of failed traps, pipe insulation. Reduces steam losses 10-20%.

Name: Energy Management System (ISO 50001)
Source: EU EED Art. 11/12 mandatory audits; IEA National EE Programme Design 2024
Description: ISO 50001-aligned EnMS: continuous monitoring, targeting & reporting. Average 3-5% ongoing savings beyond audit findings.

Name: Circular Packaging Redesign
Source: EU Taxonomy Circular Economy Objectives Annex II; EC Packaging Regulation 2024
Description: Lightweight/recyclable packaging redesign. Reduces upstream Scope 3 embedded carbon and on-site packaging waste emissions.

Name: Waste-to-Energy Diversion Programme
Source: EU taxonomy Annex II (circular economy); IEA Waste-to-Energy 2023
Description: Divert organic/combustible waste from landfill to certified energy recovery or anaerobic digestion. Reduces landfill CH4 Scope 1.
